vocab.meaning: một sự may mắn bất ngờ (khi mua được đôi giày vừa vặn)
vocab.example: It was a stroke of luck that the loafers I ordered without trying on actually fit like a glove.

vocab.meaning: có kích cỡ chuẩn so với thực tế
vocab.example: I usually check if a brand's sneakers run true to size before I finalize my online purchase.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác hối hận sau khi mua hàng
vocab.example: I experienced a bit of buyer's remorse after splurging on designer heels that turned out to be quite uncomfortable.

vocab.meaning: giao diện thân thiện với người dùng
vocab.example: The e-commerce site has such a user-friendly interface that it makes browsing for athletic footwear incredibly easy.
I managed to snag a bargain during the Black Friday sale, getting a pair of leather boots for half the original price.
Some high-end brands now offer a virtual fitting room feature to help customers visualize how the shoes look on their feet.
When shopping online, one must be vigilant to avoid accidentally purchasing counterfeit goods from unauthorized sellers.

vocab.meaning: phí vận chuyển và đóng gói
vocab.example: I often abandon my shopping cart if the shipping and handling fees are excessively high.

vocab.meaning: khách hàng sáng suốt, biết chọn lọc
vocab.example: As a discerning customer, I always scrutinize the material composition listed in the product description.
The convenience of doorstep delivery is the primary reason why I’ve shifted from physical malls to online boutiques.
